hotel_name: Khách sạn & Căn hộ JW Marriott Sài Gòn, The Apartments (JW Marriott Hotel & Suites Saigon, The Apartments)

reviews.title: Not that great
reviews.positives: We liked the location which is absolutely central but then again too central near the busy areas of the city.The hotel staff was great and made us feel comfortable and the overall experience was pleasant....would I stay here again?...probably not as there are much,much better hotels ( we realised later) by the riverside....
reviews.negatives: Its an old building and the interiors are old and dont have the contemporary feel to it.The swimming pool is a like a small pond and honestly just unappealing...the overall feel and look of the place is average.The view from the hotel is unappealing ...Not worth the rates we paid...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Awesome staff and the location was perfect

reviews.title: One of our favorite hotels! Always so happy to stay here!
reviews.positives:
Beautiful rooms and common spaces that are kept immaculately clean. Very relaxing and upscale, serene feel to the whole property. Great location. The staff is amazing. Always available - very helpful, professional and friendly. 

We were in the Residences building - in a beautiful spacious one bedroom apartment with a balcony. Everything felt new and fresh. Full kitchen and a washer dryer! Turn down service every night. 

Our reservation included the breakfast buffet in the main hotel building. The breakfast buffet is not to be missed. 
A++ service, quality, selection and beautiful dining room.

We also stopped in for happy hour at their Basilico restaurant. The complimentary focaccia and breadsticks with prosciutto were so delicious that we stayed for dinner. Great staff here as well!
reviews.negatives: We love everything about this property having stayed here several times. This is the hotel we will go back to every time we are in Ho Chi Minh City.

reviews.title: インターコンチネンタルに期待していただけにちょっとがっかり
reviews.positives:
2ベッドルーム・アパートメント・大聖堂ビューに宿泊しました。
部屋はとても広く内装も綺麗、清潔感もあり家族全員大喜びでした。
ホテルの1Fにコンビニやレストランがあるのも助かりました。
reviews.negatives:
宿泊したのが金曜〜日曜だったのですが、ホテル（大聖堂側）にライブレストランがあり、
窓閉めててもそこそこ大きな音が聞こえてきます。10時には終わるのですがそれまでは結構うるさいです。
ホテル側からは事前に説明等はありませんでした。
週末に宿泊する方は大聖堂ビュー避けた方が無難かと思います。
それとプールの水が濁ってた。プールの梯子が壊れてた。

reviews.title: 立地も、敷地内の施設も、お部屋の設備も素晴らしく、Ho Chi Ming Cityで長期滞在する方にはおすすめのResidenceです。
reviews.positives:
・前々週にHo Chi Ming Cityに6泊した際にも利用。本当は別のところを予約していましたが、その週の居心地が良く、また中心部にもとても近いので、予約を変更し再度こちらに宿泊しました。お部屋はCathedral Viewでしたが、前々週にCathedralはリノベーション中というのは分かっていたので、Viewにはあまり期待していませんでした。ただ、前々週よりも低層階（10階、前回は26階）だったので、その分右側にホテル棟がそびえる感じで正面には再建中のカテドラルが見える風景でした。ただ左側にはDong Koi通りの一部が見え、左側も街並みが綺麗に見えるので、夜景は特に良かったです。他の方が書かれているような騒音問題は、終日だからか特に何もなく静かな3日間でした。

・前回のレビューでも書きましたが、室内に洗濯乾燥機に加え、物干しラックがあるのは素晴らしい！1Fにコンビニ超便利！ビュッフェの種類豊富でおいしい！居心地はかなり良いです。

・目の前にベビー用品店があり、日本製の紙おむつ（メリーズだけ？だったと思います）やピジョンのベビーシャンプー等あり、日本から持参したものが足りなくなった際にここで買えたのは助かりました。
reviews.negatives:
（前回も書きましたが、ベースが非常に良いと思ってください。あくまで改善するともっと良くなるという視点で書いています。）
・朝食のレストランは座る位置によって、明るいところと暗いところの差が激しいです。照明の数を制限しているからか、窓際に座っても日陰だとかなり暗い感じでした。写真を撮ることを考えるともう少し明るくしてもらえると嬉しいです。

・チェックアウトが早朝5時だったので、しょうがないと思いますが、荷物搬出のためのカートでの運搬、チェックアウト作業、そしてタクシーへの荷物積み込み、すべてを1人の受付スタッフで対応いただいたのでかなり大変そうでした。。長期滞在の分荷物もかなり多いので。

reviews.title: 広くて、充実した設備のお部屋＋スタッフの対応の良さ、そして観光地への立地の良さ、1Fにコンビニ有の素晴らしいResidenceです！
reviews.positives:
・お部屋は、夫婦＋子供２人（９歳＆２歳）でも十分に広い広さで、ストレスなく過ごせました。
・割と長い滞在のため、洗濯機が備わっているのは本当に助かりました。また物干しラックがあるのは驚きました。洗濯機が備わっていても、大抵ありませんので。
・冷蔵庫＆冷凍庫は2メートル弱の高さで左右で別れるかたち。必要十分な収容力で、割と長期滞在の私たちにも十分でした。カトラリーや食器も概ね揃っていて〇。※包丁類＆まな板は常備されておらず、リクエストベースで持ってきてもらえます。
・シャワーは熱いお湯がすぐに出て、圧力も程よい感じ。バスタブも広く気持ちよく入浴できます。シャワー＆トイレが、バスルーム（シャワー＆バスタブ＆バスタブ）と別にもう一つあるので、急いでいるときに子供を一気にお風呂に入れるには便利でした。
・床は初日は少し汚れている感じでしたが、2日目からは良く床を掃除していただけていて、安心して裸足で過ごせました。スタッフの方も来るたびに部屋の前で靴を抜いてくださっていたのは◎です。
・ここのIntercontinentalは、同じ敷地内にResidence棟とHotel棟で建物が分かれていて、受付も別ですが、行き来は自由にでき、1Fエレベーターを降りて徒歩3－4分でそれぞれの棟に行けます。というのも、朝食のレストランは、Residence棟側の1FにあるBasilicoというイタリアンレストランでセットメニューで食べるか、Hotel棟側1Fのレストランでビュッフェ形式で食べるかを毎日選べます。子供と一緒ですので、種類の豊富なビュッフェにしましたが、別にランチでBasilicoで食べたところとても美味しかったので、本当はこちらでも朝食を食べてみたかったです。ビュッフェも種類が多く、味もおいしかったです。
・毎日In-Room Diningを利用しましたが、味も良く、種類も豊富で、夜中0時まで対応してくれるので助かりました。
・1Fにはこの他、GS25というローカルコンビニがありますが、これが本当に便利でした。日本のホテルに泊まっているように、何かちょっと足りない時に敷地外に出ることなく買い物ができます。品ぞろえも良い方だと思います。おにぎりもありますが、具が個性的（マヨコーンやキムチ、辛い味付けの細切り豚などなど）。ただ、ティッシュやナプキンなどの生活雑貨や、牛乳やヤクルト、ビールやおつまみなど、日本のコンビ二に近い品ぞろえです。
・利用はできませんでしたが、1FにはイタリアンのBasilico以外にも、韓国料理、創作日本食？、スタバも入っています。
・本格的な食料品の調達には、ホテルから歩いて10分かからないくらいのところにAEON Citimartという、日本でいう”まいばすけっと”的な小規模スーパーがあり、日本の食材（お豆腐やお米、調味料等）が買えます。生成食料品も生鮭などが売っているので、子供の離乳食用の食材調達にとても助かりました。
・観光するにも、徒歩で数分でSaigon Cathedral、Central Post Officeに行け、Dong Khoi Streetにも徒歩10分程度なので、かなり便利です。小さな子供が一緒で、気温も高かったので基本移動はGrabでしたが、もう少し涼しい気候のときであれば、散歩しながらいろいろな場所に観光できる立地のホテルです。
reviews.negatives:
（基本は高評価ですが、さらに良くなるために敢えて書くとすれば、というニュアンスで。）
・小さな子供連れには危ない箇所が散見されます。海外ですのでしょうがないですが。。ベランダに置いてあるイスやテーブルに上れば、ベランダの手すりは越えられてしまうので、下の子が起きている間は基本的にベランダにはでませんでした。ダイニングテーブルの高さがちょうど顔の高さなので、広くて走り回る分、何度か顔をぶつけていました。また電子レンジがかなり低い位置（大人のひざの位置くらい）にあるので、下の子が何度か操作して動かしてしまいました。
・冷蔵庫から水漏れがあり、朝起きると下に大きな水たまりが発生。Receptionに伝えると、すぐにスタッフを派遣いただき、別の冷蔵庫と交換していただけました。本当に大きな冷蔵庫なので、入れ替えが大変そうでしたが、素早く対応いただけ助かりました。
・バスルームのオーバーヘッドシャワーの水圧が弱いのが気になりました。圧力強めで浴びたいですね。
・オーバーヘッドとハンドシャワーとの切り替えハンドルが360°左右どちらにも回ってしまうため、ハンドシャワーの絵の通りに右に回しても、オーバーヘッド側から水が出る可能性があります。おかげで何度か水を被りました。。
・River Viewのお部屋を選びましたが、River Viewと呼ぶにはSaigon Riverからはちょっと離れすぎですね。。26Fでしたが、確かにSaigon Riverは見えますが周囲の建物の隙間から見えるところは見える程度で、”パーシャル”にも満たない程度だと思ってください。ここの期待値高く持つとちょっと残念に思うかもしれません。旅の後半に、再度Ho Chi Minh Cityに戻った際にCathedral View側に泊まって分かったのですが、Cathedralは再建中なので、ほぼViewは望めません。Cathedralの尖塔部分もバシリカ部分も完全に足場が組まれているので）それに比べればよかったかなとは思います。
・これもCathedral Viewのお部屋と比較してわかることですが、間取りが真逆になります。また、キッチンに収納されているカトラリーや調理道具の収納位置にルールはないようで、前のお部屋の配置とは全然違う棚にぞれぞれ収納されています。
・基本インターネットテレビが置いてありますが、後半泊まったお部屋のリビングルームのテレビは古いモデルだったので、YouTubeなどのアプリが入っているものではありませんでした。旅行にはFireStickを常に持参するので、問題はありませんでしたが。

reviews.title: This is the worst hotel.
reviews.positives: This is the most terrible hotel I have ever stayed in.
reviews.negatives:
We would like to express our deep disappointment with the quality of our stay and the service provided at your hotel, for which we paid 260 euros per night. Unfortunately, this was one of the worst experiences we have ever had in a hotel.

From the very beginning, our check-in experience was extremely unpleasant. The receptionist was openly rude and disrespectful. Prior to arrival, we had sent a request for a room on a higher floor, but our request was completely ignored. We were assigned to the lowest floor, with the balcony and windows facing pipes and exhaust systems, which caused constant loud noise throughout the night, making it impossible to sleep.

When we tried to raise this issue and speak to a manager, the receptionist refused to provide her name and claimed that there were no available rooms on higher floors, even though the hotel appeared to be almost empty.

The room condition was also completely unacceptable for a five-star hotel:
	•	The shower faucet and toilet flush were broken;
	•	Water was leaking from the ceiling near the door;
	•	Pillowcases and bed linens were dirty;
	•	The lamps and towel heater were not working.

Additionally, there was an issue with the payment process. At check-in, I explained that I could pay for the deposit only via Apple Pay. The receptionist informed me that Apple Pay was not accepted. Shortly after we entered the room, another staff member came in and removed all the drinks and even the water from the minibar, which was very unpleasant and unprofessional.

We expected a service level that reflects the high standards of the Marriott brand, but instead we encountered rudeness, neglect, and a complete lack of professionalism.
We kindly ask the management to investigate this incident and take appropriate action regarding the staff involved, as their behavior severely damages the reputation of your hotel and the Marriott name.

reviews.title: I left my apartment room within 2 hours after my check, the reception charged me full price upon my check out with a str
reviews.positives: Good location near two malls
reviews.negatives:
noisy AC 
no food in the room
very dark room with no natural light
poor food options in the restaurant by the hotel
they asked you for credit card, no apple pay option like in many hotels nowadays

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: There were some hiccups during the stay, but every staff I contacted helped us instantly. Not enough equipment in the kitchen, but no problem.
reviews.negatives: The swimming pool is tiny for the size of the hotel, and I had such a terrible experience due to some ill-mannered guests (cannonballing and screaming...). I think there should be staff checking the pool regularly so that every guest using the pool can have a pleasant time.

reviews.title: It was lovely! A few hiccups? Staff great and good breakfast spread
reviews.positives: Two bedder was huge and great views. We got upgraded for an extra cost but discounted.
reviews.negatives: Our air conditioner was working one minute then not🤷🏻‍♀️The shower was playing up in second bathroom and TV in lounge was tricky to use. Had to call maintenance 🤷🏻‍♀️

reviews.title: Perfect for exploring Saigon and also having a holiday.
reviews.positives:
Great location. 
Food and staff were  excellent.

reviews.title: Perfect stay good food smiling faces to welcome
reviews.positives: Location ,the staff helper nature  and the promptness for all the complains..a hotel breakfast menu is vast choices that can spoil one’s diet plan ,the hotel has a subway for going for restaurants which again has varieties and great food to enjoy ,
reviews.negatives: Hmmm so master  room had an issue with the air conditioner which when informed was taken care immediately but sadly again the last night for us in the hotel the air conditioner started acting funny . Luckily we had booked a suite so we shifted in the second room which was perfect

reviews.title: Huge apartment in the heart of district 1 HCMC
reviews.positives: Location was really good (in the heart of district 1 - walking distance to malls, markets and some of the popular sites eg book st, post office, independence hall etc. Apartment was huge. We stayed in a 2 bedroom apartment at the residences. Fabulous apartment with great amenities. Buffet breakfast was plentiful and delicious.  Staff friendly and extremely helpful and pleasant to deal with.
reviews.negatives:
The shower taps are so difficult to use and read - requires a degree to work out what knob is what and if you don’t have good eye site good luck ! 
We had problems with the air conditioner in our bedroom on the first night. Called to complain and  ended  up with 2 repairmen in our bedroom working on it for about 30 min. Not ideal, but they were prompt in servicing our system. 
We didn’t have access to the main pool between peak hours of 12 and 3pm which I thought was ridiculous. This is the hottest time of the day when most would like to enjoy the pool and it was closed for maintenance. We were therefore forced to use the pool at the residences building which is not very pleasant as it is shaded, small and busy (I suspect busier as the other pool was closed so you basically had the hotel and residences sharing the same pool). If you insist of charging people full price then you should ensure all the amenities are available for use particular a swimming pool in a city which is steaming hot.   Do your maintenance during a non peak time.

reviews.title: Very enjoyable
reviews.positives: Breakfast was the best we had during our stay in Vietnam
reviews.negatives: The bin in the residences could have been bigger, it was too small for a family

reviews.title: Not cheap but all very efficient and accomplished for our short stay in HCMC.
reviews.positives: Responsive and efficient staff, great location, excellent standards in the room. Breakfast was chaos on our first morning (holiday period) with everyone arriving at the same time and huge queue building up. Management quickly arrived, took charge and sorted things out very fast and the subsequent days a second restaurant was opened. Impressed by the responsiveness.
reviews.negatives: Given high floors shame there is no sky bar.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
No japanese flush in toilet 
But my friend has

15 mins walking to center

reviews.title: Nice stay in Ho Chi Minh
reviews.positives:
This was our last stay after 4 weeks of fantastic travel through Vietnam. 

We had booked an apartment so there was room for all 5. The room was fine. Fitness really good. The area is super nice with walking distance to a lot.

Breakfast was served at the hotel next door. Really good selection and super service.
reviews.negatives:
We had booked for 5, but there were only 4 beds etc. When we mentioned it, it was quickly set up. 

We arrived early by bus but were not allowed to check in earlier without having to pay extra. However, we were allowed to be in the common room and the pool until 3pm.

Pool was a bit boring considering 5 star hotel

reviews.title: Comfortable and enjoyable.
reviews.positives: Convenient location. Room is spacious and bright.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Surprisingly breakfast included Indian food. Apartment is very spacious. Hotel give up early checkin.
reviews.negatives: Wi-Fi is slow. Location is around 1 KM from the center.

reviews.title: Memorable experience. Will stay again if the price is right. Good value for money.
reviews.positives: The breakfast selection was excellent and the atmosphere in the dining area, while busy, didnt' feel crowded. There was construction ongoing at the ground floor of the property but it didn't really disturb nor did it affect the flow in the property. The location is very well placed for sight-seeing on foot.
reviews.negatives: I wish the main restaurant near the lobby at the ground floor was open and I didn't have to look at a white sheet covering the construction. This is more an aesthetic point, something that would have made me feel even better during the stay.

reviews.title: Perfect family and friends stay
reviews.positives: Breakfast was awesome

reviews.title: Excellent place for business stay. Well connected to the busy part of town as well as wvening dining options.
reviews.positives:
Big spacious room with work area, connected with small
Food court (adjacent building), just on the back of the hotel area but more private and reserved, good Italian restaurant (Basilico).
reviews.negatives: Works were ongoing for lobby renovation. Sometimes lots of noise during the day.

reviews.title: It was great. We enjoyed every bit of it. Breakfast food, location,shops around the hotel.
reviews.positives: Variety of dishes, plenty of fruit and fresh fruit juice, bread section, muffins and croissant, local food. Staff was helpful. Shops, restaurants coffee shops, Starbucks and little supermarket was helpful. Walking distance to centre. Safe place.

reviews.title: Simplistic luxury in great location
reviews.positives: Very clean and spacious 2 br apartment for a family of 4. In a great location close by to major attractions, food and shopping.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location, excellent breakfast, fab gym and pool, and very large two bedroom room with comfortable beds

reviews.title: wee are definitely coming back.

aff are attentive
reviews.negatives: Housekeeping staff know a little English, so communicating with them was quite challenging.  Otherwise, it is so minor.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Check in at 3pm is too late

reviews.title: The staff was extremely helpful, accomodating and courteous. The place is clean.
reviews.positives: N/A

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: big room with many amenities for long stay, bed is big and comfortable, air-con units are perfectly placed- it worked quietly so we have a very good night sleep. room is soundproof so we hardly hear any noise from the busy street below
reviews.negatives: the shower faucet system is not user friendly, it's very difficult to turn especially when your hands are slippery with soap

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Love the residence set-up, very spacious and comfortable. Staff are so nice and helpful. Breakfast is good and you are connected to the mall.
reviews.negatives: Please add bidet.

reviews.title: Great first taste of Vietnam and awesome buffet brekkie cannot be beaten
reviews.positives: Good location and amazing buffet breakfast
reviews.negatives: The booking wasn’t clear about the extra bed being included so it wasn’t set up when we arrived. We had a very late flight so this was a bit frustrating. They sorted pretty quickly.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location, breakfast spread and the apartment itself
reviews.negatives: Low water pressure for master bathroom

reviews.title: Great way to start our trip in Vietnam
reviews.positives: The space, location and incredible staff
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I reallu like everything in this hotel, location and service and breakfast and pool and spa and appartment for sure! Staied here already several years. The best place in Ho Chi Min City/

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Lovely well appointed apartment - good feeling of space 
Nicely located
Really helpful staff who cared
reviews.negatives: The inconvenience of construction causing confusing access

reviews.title: Fantastic stay
reviews.positives: Clean, luxurious, wonderful
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Proceed with confidence.
reviews.positives: Perfect location. Room was huge and the extra space was very much appreciated. Cleaned everyday. Amenities were perfect from toiletries to kitchen supplies. Convenience store on the ground floor was a huge plus. Many restaurants, all good. It was the perfect stay for my family and I. Grab was easy to book and never struggled finding the hotel. Breakfast was amazing.
reviews.negatives: Nitpicking only. I wish our rooms had a bedet.

reviews.title: All just Super!
reviews.positives: Super breakfast. Super room. Super staff. Super location. Quite super really!

reviews.title: The stay was fantastic and I will again return
reviews.positives: I find Miss Van and Miss Phong at the Residences Reception where amazing with everything of my stay and always thoughtful and pleasant and professional in all they assisted with me during my stay. Very grateful ⭐️⭐️
reviews.negatives: Business Center

reviews.title: GOOD PROPERTY VALUW FOR MONEY
reviews.positives: THE PROPERTY IS CENTRALLY LOCATED THE HOTEL HAS A AMAZING BREAKFAST AND THE ROOM APARTMENT IS AMAZING .
reviews.negatives: THE WASHROOM HEAD SHOWER NEED MORE ADEQUATE WATER PRESSURE WHICH IS NOT THERE

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Service and staff helped us with cooking tools for our apartment

reviews.title: overall good, will come again.
reviews.positives: good !
reviews.negatives: breakfast.

reviews.title: Luxurious stay
reviews.positives: The 2 bedroom apartment was so spacious and lovely. Both bathrooms were great and the views were superb. The best thing was thhe buffet breakfast in the morning - so many options and the food was fresh and delicious.
reviews.negatives: Nothing,  everything was wonderful

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel, staff are very helpful
reviews.positives: Outstanding breakfast in the hotel

reviews.title: I want to stay again.
reviews.positives: The staff's response is good and clean

reviews.title: Great stay in the heart of Saigon!
reviews.positives:
Great property with an am inn location and nearby to all places of interest. 
Spectacular range at the breakfast and because it’s located adjacent to the M Plaza mall you can have multiple eating options as well.
reviews.negatives: The only drawback was the breakfast not being available in the residences and once has to go to the hotel for having it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location and walking distance to so many places. Apartments were clean, spacious and had everything you needed. Friendly for family or group trips. Staff also very easy to work with.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Everything was great!

reviews.title: Very comfortable stay with excellent service!
reviews.positives: Excellent accommodation. Spacious suite, very well equipped kitchenette, laundry cupboard with washing machine. Fabulous bathroom. The staff are amazing!  Great service. Residences links with Intercontinental Hotel - so 2 options for breakfast. The breakfast at the hotel is worth a visit!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Perfect location with such wonderful staff
reviews.positives: Perfect location with such wonderful staff
